column1: # Range names usable as range input in POINT prompts.
# Builds on the typed-range buffer (m3_point_typed_range.tsv) — when
# the buffer doesn't parse as a literal range, fall back to looking
# up the buffer (case-insensitive) as a defined range name.
# /RFF 0, then POINT — type the name and Enter resolves it.
# Case-insensitive: SALES resolves the same way.
# Underscore is allowed in name input (Lotus convention).
# Unknown name is a silent no-op — buffer cleared, stay in POINT, no
# Recover by typing a valid literal range.
# /RND removes the name; subsequent typed-name lookup misses.
# Literal range input still works alongside the name path.
